caption: Farm Bureau AgriVisor
description: Not sure what Dad's connection is to this one, but perhaps it's a nod to our family's time in the Midwest. I looked up this entity, and according to FarmWeekNow.com it appears to be some sort of consulting service for farmers.

caption: U.S. Air Force Museum
description: Looks like this is a museum in Dayton, Ohio. Dad must have visited at some point.

caption: Alondra Golf Course
description: A golf course in Los Angeles. Dad loves golf.

caption: Alta Genetics USA
description: I had to look this one up — it's an agricultural genetics/genomics company. 🤷

caption: New Zealand
description: I remember my parents were planning a trip to New Zealand but I can't remember if they ever went...

caption: Arizona
description: My parents used to spend winters in Arizona to escape Midwest winters before they moved to California, where they now enjoy summer weather year round.

caption: Chicago Bears
description: *George Wendt voice* Da Bearss

caption: Grand Canyon
description: He's been to the Grand Canyon multiple times.

caption: Brighton, England
description: I think my dad went on a work trip to Brighton once.

caption: Bryn Mawr College
description: My sister's alma mater.

caption: Cabrillo National Monument
description: My parents must have visited this national monument in San Diego at some point in their travels.

caption: Cadillac Mountain
description: Must have been one of the sights my dad saw when he and my mom went to Acadia National Park in Maine.

caption: Death Valley National Park
description: Another national park visited!

caption: Devils Tower National Monument
description: Another national monument visited!

caption: Florida Gators
description: I didn't think my dad was a big college football fan and I don't know of any connection he has to the Gators, but maybe he got this from a friend or something?

caption: Grand Canyon National Park
description: Multiple Grand Canyon hats in this set — I bet my mom told him he already has a Grand Canyon hat but he insisted on having two 😂

caption: George Washington National Forest
description: Another national forest

caption: Illinois Farm Bureau
description: No idea why my dad has multiple farm bureau hats. Maybe they just give them out in the Midwest.

caption: Israel National Parks Authority
description: From a trip my dad made to the Holy Land

caption: Madrid
description: I guess my dad went to Spain at some point.

caption: Masada
description: From a trip my dad made to the Holy Land

caption: The Morton Arboretum
description: One of my dad's favorite places. He and my mom were members for years.

caption: New Mexico
description: My parents love the southwest, especially in winter.

caption: Nike (swoosh only)
description: I think this one was actually my hat when I was a kid — I got it at the mall when the Bulls were on a tear and wore it with my Jordan jersey. I guess my dad wanted to keep it even though he didn't wear it.

caption: Nike
description: Nike

caption: Northwestern Medicine
description: The community hospital my mom worked at was acquired by Northwestern at some point.

caption: Paris, France
description: I've been to Paris twice with my parents, once on a family trip where we accidentally stayed in the red light district (it was perfectly fine and made for a good story), and once when I was living in London and they came to visit. I don't know which trip this hat is from (or if my dad ever went outside of those times).

caption: The Great Passion Play
description: I forget what a passion play is but it's something with religious significance to Christians so my dad would have cared about it.

caption: Pebble Beach
description: My dad loves California beaches.

caption: Penn
description: We went on a prospective college tour for my sister and this was one of our stops. I guess my dad wanted to keep this hat from Penn even though she didn't end up going here lol. This would have been in the late '90s.

caption: Phoenix
description: One of my parents' favorite cities in America

caption: Pikes Peak
description: Another nature-themed hat. My dad loves mountains, although I'm not sure he would have actually summitted the peak.

caption: Plum Tree
description: Unsure of the siginficance of this one (my dad does love fruit).

caption: Point Reyes National Seashore
description: Another California beach.

caption: Route 66
description: My dad loves Americana.

caption: Salzburg
description: Part of our family lives in Germany so we went a few times when I was a kid. One on occasion we went to Austria, including Salzburg. The only thing I remember from that day is that we went to Mozart's birthplace.

caption: Scotland (blue)
description: I studied abroad in Scotland as an undergraduate and my parents came to visit me.

caption: Scotland (white)
description: Multiple Scotland hats in this set. One of them might actually be mine (I studied abroad there).

caption: Seneca Golf Course
description: There are multiple Seneca Golf Courses - I don't know which one this is

caption: San Francisco
description: My sister lived in SF for a while so my dad must have gotten this when visiting her.

caption: Slone Construction Company
description: Another random one whose significance I don't know

caption: S.S. Badger
description: Looked this one up and it's a carferry service for Lake Michigan, which I guess my dad must have used at some point when we were in the Chicago area

caption: Superstition Mountains
description: Another mountain.

caption: Titleist
description: Another golf-themed one.

caption: Tuzigoot National Monument
description: Another national monument.

caption: Universal Studios
description: I don't know if I was on this trip to Universal Studios but of course my dad got a hat from here.

caption: Illinois Beach USA
description: Must have been from one of the beaches on Lake Michigan.

caption: Vancouver 2010
description: My dad didn't go to the Olympics but we did go to Vancouver, presumably after the Olympics.
